name: dcgm
explanation: NVIDIA's dcgm-exporter exposes GPU telemetry as Prometheus metrics on the universally documented port 9400 at `/metrics`. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 with no additional auth; the spec template just overrides the example endpoint. Single canonical port and path, no credentials — generic OpenMetrics port-scan applies.
notes: Pattern A: OpenMetrics on a known port (9400). No existing auto_conf.yaml on disk, but adding one would be straightforward.
